payloadSeedPolicy.note: Payload generator is defined in a later stage; this stage freezes the fields only.

noiseSeedPolicy.principle: Every frame uses an independent standard Gaussian vector. Same seed context reproduces the same frame.

noiseGroupIdDefinition.meaning: Fair comparison group id. Algorithms in the same group share the same standard Gaussian noise, received symbols, or LLR as applicable.
noiseGroupIdDefinition.ccSharedGroup: hard and soft Viterbi share payload, codeword, puncturing result, standard Gaussian noise, and receivedSymbols.
noiseGroupIdDefinition.ldpcSharedGroup: Layered BP and Layered NMS share payload, codeword, H, standard Gaussian noise, receivedSymbols, and LLR.
